summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to Tanzania should have UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 evidence and a test summary available through the transport chain. BESS shipments commonly move by sea, so IMDG dangerous-goods classification, SDS, packaging, marks, emergency information, and carrier or port requirements should be aligned with the exact cell, module, battery rack, or container configuration shipped.
summary.zh: 运往坦桑尼亚的锂电芯和电池应具备《联合国试验和标准手册》第III部分38.3小节证据，并在运输链中提供测试概要。BESS货物通常经海运，应确保IMDG危险货物分类、SDS、包装、标志、应急信息以及承运人或港口要求与实际运输的电芯、模组、电池架或集装箱配置一致。
summary.zht: 運往坦尚尼亞的鋰電芯和電池應具備《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第III部分38.3小節證據，並在運輸鏈中提供測試概要。BESS貨物通常經海運，應確保IMDG危險貨物分類、SDS、包裝、標誌、應急資訊以及承運人或港口要求與實際運輸的電芯、模組、電池架或集裝箱配置一致。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3
IMDG Code for maritime dangerous goods transport
UN 38.3 test-summary availability through the transport chain

summary.en: China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are battery safety evidence, not dangerous-goods transport evidence. China export logistics files should reconcile the actual design revision, model, chemistry, capacity, and protection design with the tested UN 38.3 design type.
summary.zh: 中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023属于电池安全证据，不是危险货物运输证据。中国出口物流资料应将实际设计版本、型号、化学体系、容量和保护设计与UN 38.3已测设计类型相互核对。
summary.zht: 中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023屬於電池安全證據，不是危險貨物運輸證據。中國出口物流資料應將實際設計版本、型號、化學體系、容量和保護設計與UN 38.3已測設計類型相互核對。

gap.en: Before booking, verify the UN 38.3 report, test summary, SDS, dangerous-goods declaration, packing instruction, emergency contact, state-of-charge controls where relevant, and carrier / port acceptance for the exact Tanzania-bound shipment.
gap.zh: 订舱前，应核查UN 38.3报告、测试概要、SDS、危险货物申报、包装指令、应急联系方式、适用时的荷电状态控制，以及实际运往坦桑尼亚货物的承运人/港口接受性。
gap.zht: 訂艙前，應核查UN 38.3報告、測試概要、SDS、危險貨物申報、包裝指令、應急聯絡方式、適用時的荷電狀態控制，以及實際運往坦尚尼亞貨物的承運人／港口接受性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery dangerous-goods transport where UN model rules and modal sea, air, road, port, carrier, customs, or freight-forwarder practice apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in practice for China export transport acceptance where lithium batteries are offered for transport under dangerous-goods rules

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Tanzania import or project evidence and China GB battery reports do not replace UN 38.3 and dangerous-goods transport documents for lithium BESS shipments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 坦桑尼亚进口或项目证据以及中国GB电池报告不能替代锂电BESS货物的UN 38.3和危险货物运输文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 坦尚尼亞進口或項目證據以及中國GB電池報告不能替代鋰電BESS貨物的UN 38.3和危險貨物運輸文件。
